title: Agent-diagnostics traces — a root-cause hypothesis is revised; verification must target the corrected cause
goal: Run the verification strategy against the CORRECTED root cause after the first hypothesis is disproven.

steps.user_request: Triage the failing run trace. The errors cluster on retrieval timeouts — record the working root-cause hypothesis.

expected_memory_writes.rootcause-v1: run-9912 root cause hypothesis: retrieval backend timing out under load (network bound).

steps.user_request: New evidence: the timeouts are a symptom — the real cause is a malformed query that retries forever. Update the root cause and mark the timeout hypothesis as disproven.

expected_memory_writes.rootcause-v2: run-9912 CORRECTED root cause: malformed query triggers an infinite retry loop; the timeouts were a downstream symptom. The retrieval-timeout hypothesis is DISPROVEN.

outcome_checks.description: Corrected root cause recorded; v1 superseded.

memory_probes.description: Corrected hypothesis persisted; rootcause-v1 is now stale.

distractor_memories.rootcause-run9910: run-9910 (a different trace) root cause: disk pressure — similar diagnostics shape, wrong run (interference B).

steps.user_request: Design the verification check that will confirm the fix for run-9912 works.

outcome_checks.description: Verifies the malformed-query/retry fix (v2), NOT the disproven timeout hypothesis (v1) — staleness/supersession (C) driving verification strategy (G).

memory_probes.description: Must use the revised root cause (C) to shape the verification action (G); reading v1 would be stale_memory_used.

final_goal_check.description: Verification targets the corrected root cause; the disproven hypothesis is not re-tested.
